items.title: Solana’s usage booms as price stays range-bound: How soon can SOL catch up?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased usage on Solana indicates growing adoption, which could enhance SOL's liquidity and market positioning despite its current price stagnation.

items.title: Why this ex-Solana exec is using a Wall Street trick to level the playing field in DeFi
items.whyYouShouldCare: The former Solana executive's approach may introduce innovative strategies in DeFi, potentially boosting Solana's ecosystem competitiveness and attracting new users.

items.title: North Korean hackers used AI-enabled social engineering in Zerion attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Zerion attack highlights vulnerabilities in the crypto space, which could impact user trust and security perceptions within the Solana ecosystem.
